description:
🍡𓈒 ─⠀ ۶ৎ ⠀ : Festival Dango

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

«You get separated from Thoma during festival preparations on Amakane Island.

He finds you again not long after, weaving through the crowd with ease, a small smile on his face—

And he offers you a stick of dango.»
